nodes.long_description:
Become a world class driver in your very own high-speed Formula race car! FormulaX is here to push your driving to the limit:

🏁 REALISTIC FORMULA RACING 🏁

- Feel the rush of Formula-style race cars with cutting-edge realistic driving mechanics.
- Hug those hairpin turns, following the race line and overpassing your opponents! 
- As you accelerate, you'll feel the engine roar beneath you

🔧 STRATEGIC PITSTOPS 🔧
- As your tires wear down, you'll need to make crucial decisions – when to pit and change tires can make or break your victory.

🥇 GLOBAL COMPETITION 🥇 🔜

- Join the world's elite racers in high-stakes multiplayer races.
- Compete against players from every corner of the globe, testing your skills and strategy in intense races.

⏱️ SOLO CHALLENGES ⏱️

- Practice your skills in single-player mode, where you can race against the clock or bots and test your limits in time trials.

🏎️ CUSTOMIZE YOUR RACE MACHINE 🏎️

- Customize every aspect of your racing machine, from the engine to the paint job, and make it truly your own.
-Different Car parts effect your driving mechanics!

🛣️ CONQUER LEGENDARY CIRUITS 🛣️

- FormulaX offers you the chance to master 10 iconic race circuits, each with its unique challenges and surprises.
- Feel the history and prestige of these legendary tracks as you aim for the checkered flag.

Get ready to experience the peak of VR Formula racing in FormulaX! So, rev up your engines, hit the track, and show the world what it takes to be a FormulaX champion!
nodes.short_description:
FormulaX is a NEW racing game from the creators of MotoX! 🏎️💨🏁

Get behind the wheel of Formula style high speed race cars with realistic driving mechanics! Hug turns as you feel the engine rev, but be careful of your tires! You'll need to stop at the pits to change your tires if your going to win! Compete against players worldwide in multiplayer races or test your skills in single-player mode & time trials. Customize your racing machine & master legendary race circuits!

nodes.change_log:
🚨 FormulaX Multiplayer Alpha Update is LIVE! 🚨

Racers, the highly anticipated Multiplayer Update for FormulaX is finally here! Our team has been working non-stop to bring this massive update to you. We’ve packed in a ton of exciting new features, and while we could have spent more time perfecting everything, we wanted to get it into your hands to hear your thoughts and fix the most important issues quickly. As this is still in Alpha, there may be bugs, but your feedback will help us improve. Thank you for being part of this journey!

Here’s what’s new:

1. Multiplayer Mode (Main Feature)
This update brings real-time multiplayer racing to FormulaX! Whether you're racing against friends or competitors from around the world, this is a whole new way to experience FormulaX.

- Race Logic: We've added fully integrated lap systems, race finishes, and start cooldowns to make multiplayer races

- Starting Lights: You’ll now see new starting lights with accompanying sound effects to get you pumped for the race!

- Multiplayer Room UI: The multiplayer room interface has been revamped for easier navigation and a better experience when setting up races.
Car Livery Sync: Show off your custom car design in multiplayer—everyone will see your personalized livery!

- Dynamic Leaderboard: Track player positions in real time as the race progresses. (Note: There's a known bug, and we're working on it!)
Voice Chat with 3D Sound: Communicate with your fellow racers in real-time with positional audio for a more immersive experience.

- Finish Leaderboard: Now, your placement and finish time difference are displayed at the end of each race.
Server Region Selection: Select your region to minimize lag and optimize multiplayer performance.

2. Optimization and Customization Options
- Track Optimizations: Take on three brand new, iconic tracks—Monza, Barcelona, and Las Vegas—all available in both singleplayer and multiplayer modes.

- New Helmets: Two additional helmets are now available in the shop for you to purchase and equip.

- Car Customization: We’ve updated the car customization system with new liveries and a fresh new panel in the shop. Plus, you can now customize and showcase your unique car setup!

- New Gloves: Deck out your driver with a new set of gloves available for purchase.

3. Race Penalty System
We’ve introduced a Race Penalty System to make races more competitive and strategic.

Types of Penalties:

- Track Cuts: Cutting corners comes with a penalty.
- Wall Collision: Hitting walls will now affect your race time.
- Car Collision: Racing aggressively has its consequences!
- Track Limits: Going off-track with more than two wheels will incur a time penalty.
- Unfair Overtake: Gaining unfair advantage by overtaking outside of regulations will result in penalties.

Penalty Application:

- Singleplayer: Violations turn your lap timer red, invalidating that lap.
- Multiplayer: Penalty time is added to your final race result.
- Penalty Notification: Penalties are displayed in the dynamic leaderboard and final results to keep the race fair.

4. New and Improved UI
- New Racing UI: We've redesigned the in-race UI to be more intuitive and immersive, giving you all the essential race data at a glance.
- Menu UI Enhancements: Improved menu animations and updated team icons for a smoother navigation experience.
- Dynamic Leaderboard Improvements: Penalty time is now visible on the dynamic leaderboard and finish leaderboard.

5. Bug Fixes & Optimizations
- Multiplayer Bug Fixes: Several multiplayer issues have been addressed to make racing smoother.
- Optimization: Game performance has been improved for more stable and fluid gameplay, even on the most action-packed tracks.
- Portable Steering Wheel Support: We’ve added initial support for Boyo steering wheels with USB-C connection (XBOX gamepad emulation compatible).
- Miscellaneous Fixes: Various other bugs have been squashed to enhance your racing experience!

A Quick Reminder:
This is still Alpha, which means you might encounter bugs, and we need your help to find and report them! We’ve been working hard to get this update out as quickly as possible, but there’s always room for improvement. Please keep sending in your feedback, and we’ll work to address the most pressing issues first. Your patience and support mean the world to us!

Thank you for being part of the FormulaX community! Let’s race! 🏎️💨

See you on the track,
The FormulaX Team
